name: testWaitForDiagAuthCompleted, testWaitForDiagAuthGenericCompleted
title: testWaitForDiagAuthCompleted, testWaitForDiagAuthGenericCompleted
syntax: long testWaitForDiagAuthCompleted (char ecuQualifier[], char authenticationCall[]); // form 1
description: Initiates the diagnostics authentication process and waits until this process has (generic) completed.

parameters.name: authenticationCall
parameters.description: Call that has to be accepted by the security source runtime implementation.
